focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jason Bourne, severely wounded, flees through Moscow, evading police before staggering toward a pharmacy for help.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fugitive hiding in shadows after police cars pass in Moscow.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lifts himself up and staggers toward a pharmacy for medical treatment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Reach the pharmacy to treat injuries.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Staggering across a park toward the pharmacy.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Severe wounds and police pursuit in the vicinity.
evidence_quotes: we're running down an alley...
Up against the wall -- BOURNE is hidden in the shadows.
With a GROAN, he lifts himself up,
staggers across a park toward a PHARMACY...

status_updates: Severely wounded
Seeking medical help
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Determined to survive despite injuries.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne, speaking Russian, demands a gun and radio from a policeman, disables him, smashes the radio, takes the weapon, and exits. Scene cuts to title 'THE BOURNE ULTIMATUM' and jumps six weeks later.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Disarming police and escaping the pharmacy.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne disables one policeman, coerces another to surrender a gun and radio, destroys the radio, and exits, leading to a six-week time jump.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Escape the immediate threat and secure a weapon.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne is armed with an additional gun and free from the scene; narrative jumps six weeks later.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Events during the six-week gap.
evidence_quotes: BOURNE turns, grabs the gun from the sink, and disables the approaching officer.
BOURNE, speaking in Russian, demands, 'Give me your gun and radio.'
BOURNE adds in Russian, 'My argument is not with you,' before smashing the radio and taking the gun.

relation_updates: Adversarial but non-lethal interaction with police
status_updates: Armed with additional gun
Radio destroyed
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Resourceful evader using non-lethal force.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Martin learns his sister was killed by a man who came for Bourne, who then killed the attacker. Bourne vows to find whoever started the conflict and leaves.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Informs Martin of Marie's death and declares pursuit of the conflict's originator.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne confirms Marie's death to Martin and states his intention to find who started the conflict.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Find the person who started all this.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne leaves Martin after announcing his mission.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The identity of the individual who initiated the conflict.
evidence_quotes: She's dead. She was killed.
She was shot. A man came for me.
Someone started all this...and I'm going to find them.
Bourne nods.

relation_updates: Informs Martin of Marie's death
Accepts responsibility for killing her attacker
status_updates: Declares active pursuit of Treadstone's originator
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Determined investigator focused on uncovering the conflict's origin.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne demands the name of a Treadstone insider from Ellatrace, threatening to destroy their operation if he doesn't get it, as a journalist in London has a source connected to his past.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Violent interrogator confronting Ellatrache.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Physically assaults Ellatrache and demands the name of who started Treadstone, learning that journalist Simon Ross has a source inside the program.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Obtain the name of who started Treadstone.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Secures a lead on Simon Ross and issues an ultimatum to destroy Treadstone operations if the name is not provided.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the lead to Simon Ross will yield the desired name.
evidence_quotes: Who started Treadstone?
There's a journalist in London. Simon Ross. He seems to know a lot about you. He has a source inside the program.
They give me the name I want, or I burn their entire house down to get it.

relation_updates: Confronts and threatens Ellatrache
status_updates: Learns of Simon Ross's Treadstone source
Issues ultimatum to Treadstone operatives
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Uses physical force and direct threats to extract information.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne spots approaching operatives, urges Ross to move and answer his phone, as they attempt to escape together while discussing Treadstone and Blackbriar.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Questioning Ross about Treadstone and Blackbriar while evading operatives.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hears from Ross that Blackbriar is a program that started with him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To escape with Ross and continue questioning him about Blackbriar.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Confused about Blackbriar but actively moving to evade operatives with Ross.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What Blackbriar is and how it began with Bourne.
evidence_quotes: BOURNE Why do you know so much about me?
BOURNE What? What are you talking about?

relation_updates: Cooperates with Ross under immediate threat
status_updates: Received new information about Blackbriar
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Operative persisting in interrogation under immediate threat.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne researches the Ross notebook, finds locations linked to Sewell and Marbury, discovers a Madrid receipt, and departs.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Researcher using Ross notebook and internet to investigate Sewell and Marbury.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finds a receipt from Madrid while searching for Sewell and Marbury locations.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Investigate the Madrid receipt further.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Leaves the internet cafe with Madrid identified as a new lead.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Must travel to Madrid to examine the receipt.
evidence_quotes: He Googles "Sewell and Marbury"-- finds Paris, Berlin, Madrid.
BOURNE continues to search and finds receipt from Madrid.

relation_updates: Bourne's adversarial relation to Blackbriar reinforced through investigation
status_updates: Gains new information about Sewell and Marbury locations
Identifies Madrid as next destination
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Methodical in his research approach.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne encounters Nicky, who was posted there after Berlin; they reactivate communication as a phone rings, switching to speaker mode.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Operative who hesitates to shoot upon recognizing Nicky and initiates speakerphone call.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne encounters Nicky, hesitates to shoot, asks about her presence, and they listen to a phone call on speaker.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne and Nicky are together, listening to an office phone call on speaker.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The content of the phone call and Nicky's assignment after Berlin.
evidence_quotes: hesitating because- It's NICKY.
BOURNE What are you doing here?
He hits the speaker phone.

relation_updates: Reconnected with Nicky
Inquired about Daniels
status_updates: In communication with Nicky
Listening to phone call on speaker
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Cautious former ally re-establishing contact.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne overpowers Desh, who collapses and dies during the struggle; Bourne and Nicky fake their deaths by sending a false message to mislead Vosen and Landy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Protagonist kills an assassin and fakes death with ally to evade pursuers.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: During a rooftop fight, Bourne kills Desh and then, with Nicky, sends a false message to fake their deaths.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To evade capture by appearing dead.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Believed dead by Vosen and Landy after false message confirmation.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Agency pursuers are deceived, but the overall threat remains.
evidence_quotes: In the struggle, Bourne inadvertently strangles Desh, who goes still.
Bourne tells Nicky, 'Alright, we need to be dead. You need to code that in.'
Nicky codes into Desh’s PDA: BOTH OBJECTIVES ACHIEVED.
Vosen and Landy see it and believe Nicky and Bourne are both DEAD.

relation_updates: Strengthens alliance with Nicky through coordinated action and trust
status_updates: Becomes believed dead by pursuers
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Tactical deceiver.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne is told his real name is David Webb by Landy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Amnesiac agent.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy tells Bourne his real name is David Webb.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne has been informed that his birth name is David Webb.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The full story behind his identity and past.
evidence_quotes: Bourne listening--
LANDY David Webb. That's your real name.

relation_updates: Identity revealed as David Webb
status_updates: True name disclosed
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bourne, an amnesiac agent, receives confirmation of his true name.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 316、INT. ROOM WHERE BOURNE FIRST MET HIRSCH
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne recalls being forced to kill to become Jason Bourne, confronts Hirsch about his transformation, refuses to kill him, and declares he's ending the program and his past identity.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bourne recalls his forced initiation into killing, refuses to kill Hirsch, and rejects the Jason Bourne identity.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne remembers being coerced to kill to become Jason Bourne, then chooses not to kill Hirsch and declares he is ending the program and his Bourne identity.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To end the program and stop being Jason Bourne.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne has refused to kill Hirsch and declared he is no longer Jason Bourne, but agents are arriving at the door.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Agents are at the door, and Bourne must escape to act on his declaration.
evidence_quotes: Bourne lowers the gun and affirms he remembers everything—the truth of his transformation.
Bourne declares he’s done running—that’s why he’s here: to end Hirsch and shut down the program.
He asserts he is no longer Jason Bourne.
Bourne refuses, stating Hirsch doesn’t deserve the honor of a star on the wall at Langley.

relation_updates: Bourne refuses to kill Hirsch, breaking the cycle of violence
Bourne declares he is no longer Jason Bourne and is ending the program
status_updates: Bourne's memory is fully restored, including the traumatic killing that made him Jason Bourne
Bourne rejects the identity imposed on him and claims his own agency
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An individual reclaiming his past identity and asserting control.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: FBI arrests senior CIA officials amid a scandal involving the exposed 'Blackbriar' assassination program, allegedly authorized at the highest government levels and targeting US citizens, revealed by former assassin David Webb.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fugitive cornered on a rooftop by an armed pursuer.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Escapes by jumping into the East River; concurrent news reports expose the Blackbriar program.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Escape Paz and survive the immediate threat.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In the East River, sinking after a fourteen-story fall.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Bourne survives the jump and what his next move will be.
evidence_quotes: Bourne turns and runs off the roof.
FOLLOW Bourne as he drops fourteen stories into the freezing river--
Bourne in a dead man's float...as his clothes soak through he begins to sink....

relation_updates: Confronts Paz, questioning his motives in an adversarial exchange
status_updates: Location changes from roof to East River
Blackbriar program publicly exposed, altering his hunted status
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Confrontational escapist.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Nicky sees a news report about Webb, 'Jason Bourne,' who jumped into the East River; underwater, Bourne suddenly comes to life and swims away, his body never recovered.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Operative reviving after a fall and escaping underwater.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bourne's body comes to life underwater and he swims away, confirming his survival.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne is alive and swimming away from the scene.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Where Bourne is headed and what he plans to do next, as his body was not recovered.
evidence_quotes: Bourne's body sinking toward the bottom...
when all of a sudden it comes to life -- arms together, legs kick powerfully--
And Bourne swims away...

status_updates: Confirmed alive and escaped
Body not recovered, indicating evasion or freedom
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Survivor

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Jason Bourne, severely wounded in Moscow, survives and pursues the origins of Treadstone and Blackbriar. He confronts his past, allies with Nicky Parsons, and learns his true identity as David Webb. After exposing the Blackbriar program and renouncing his assassin persona, he escapes and survives.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ross interviews Daniels in Turin, showing evidence linking Bourne to past events and Marie's death, while questioning Treadstone's role; Daniels demands the recorder be turned off.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: CIA officer briefing new superior Kramer on Bourne case
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Suggests Bourne is searching for missing memories rather than being a direct threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Landy maintains her assessment that Bourne is not simply a threat, but Kramer views him as a serious threat
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Kramer remains skeptical and insists Bourne is a serious threat until proven otherwise
evidence_quotes: LANDY I think he's looking for something he hasn't found.
LANDY I'm not sure. Maybe he hasn't gotten his memory back yet. Not all of it.
LANDY If he just wanted to hurt us he could have sent this tape to CNN.

relation_updates: Provides professional assessment to new superior Kramer
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Analyst who prioritizes understanding Bourne's motives over immediate threat assessment

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 96、INT. DAY. POSH HOTEL -- NEW YORK CITY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vosen shows Landy evidence of Bourne in Paris, claiming he's a threat and involved in a leak; Landy remains skeptical and questions Vosen's handling of the operation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Skeptical former case officer confronting current operation head
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy refuses Vosen's offer to rejoin the Bourne investigation and states she will investigate independently.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Investigate the Bourne case on her own without Vosen's operation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Landy is heading to her office to conduct her own investigation.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What really happened at Waterloo Station and who is responsible for the reporter's death?
evidence_quotes: LANDY Nothing for me.
LANDY Probably because it's coming from you, Noah.
LANDY So what happened at Waterloo?
LANDY I'm going to the office now. I'll make my own introductions.

relation_updates: Openly distrusts Vosen and his motives
Refuses to collaborate with Vosen's team
status_updates: Decides to conduct independent investigation at the office
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Distrustful of Vosen and insists on independent action.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Landy directs the team to prioritize Ross's information on screen while continuing the search for Bourne, building on their last known location from London.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader of the Bourne search operation at CRI hub
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Assumes direct control of the search team, bypasses introductions, and orders immediate activation of all surveillance resources
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Locate and track Jason Bourne
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Directing the search team with surveillance systems activated and Ross's data displayed on screen
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bourne's exact location and current status remain unknown
evidence_quotes: Let's do names later.
What's Bourne's last fixed position?
I want everyone to sit down, strap in, and turn on all you've got. (beat) That would mean now.
I want everything you've got on Ross on screen one.

relation_updates: Assumes leadership role over search team
status_updates: Now quarterbacking the search effort for Bourne
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Assertive leader who prioritizes action over formalities

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vosen sees Bourne as a threat needing elimination, while Landy believes he must be brought in voluntarily for a peaceful resolution.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Advocate for voluntary capture
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy states that bringing Bourne in voluntarily is the only way to achieve a happy ending, directly countering Vosen's elimination stance.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bring Bourne in voluntarily for a peaceful resolution.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Conflict with Vosen persists; no agreement on handling Bourne.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to achieve voluntary capture given Vosen's opposition.
evidence_quotes: The only way this has a happy ending, Noah, is if we find a way to bring Bourne in voluntarily.

relation_updates: Conflict with Vosen over Bourne's fate
Positive relational stance towards Bourne based on trust
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Officer prioritizing non-lethal resolution through voluntary means.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Landy challenges Vosen's authority to order lethal action against Daniels, who possesses sensitive Blackbriar files; Vosen justifies it with a 'Lethal Action Protocol' bypassing oversight.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Senior CIA officer confronting Vosen's lethal authority
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Discovers Blackbriar's Lethal Action Protocol that bypasses oversight for lethal actions
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Challenge Vosen's authorization for lethal action against Daniels
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Knows that Vosen can order lethal action without oversight under Blackbriar Protocol
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to oppose or counteract Vosen's unilateral authority within the CIA
evidence_quotes: LANDY Since when do you have authorization for lethal action against Daniels?
LANDY You just decide? No oversight. No checks and balances.

relation_updates: Adversarial relationship with Vosen escalates over ethical boundaries
status_updates: Becomes aware of Blackbriar's lethal action protocol
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Confrontational CIA officer questioning unethical practices

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Landy urgently tries to contact Kramer, who refuses to take her call; she reacts with quiet determination, hinting at impending action against institutional resistance.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Senior CIA officer attempting to contact Kramer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy's urgent call to Kramer is refused, prompting her to act independently.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To secure Kramer's intervention in an urgent matter.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Landy is blocked from institutional support and prepares to take action alone.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What action will Landy take after Kramer's refusal?
evidence_quotes: LANDY: 'It's Pamela Landy for him. Would you tell him it's urgent?'
KRAMER, after a pause, decides: 'Tell her I'm unreachable.'
She hangs up the phone slowly
Then, resolutely, she gets up

relation_updates: Kramer refuses to take her call, blocking institutional recourse
status_updates: Blocked from contacting superior authority
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Isolated agent forced to act without backup.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne's unused Treadstone passport was detected at JFK, indicating he's alive; Landy and Cronin deduce the agency doesn't know yet, as Vosen would be acting otherwise.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Intelligence officer learning Bourne is alive from passport detection
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Learns from Cronin that Bourne's unused Treadstone passport cleared Immigration at JFK, confirming he is alive, and deduces that the agency is unaware
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To track Bourne or exploit the information gap
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Confirmed Bourne is alive and that the agency does not know, positioning her to act
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to proceed with the information about Bourne
evidence_quotes: This passport just cleared Immigration at JFK ten minutes ago.
It's an early Treadstone identity registered to Jason Bourne but he never used it and it never went to the grid.
They don't know.
No, if they knew Vosen wouldn't be in his office right now.

relation_updates: Strengthens working relationship with Cronin through shared intelligence
status_updates: Gains knowledge of Bourne's reappearance and agency's ignorance
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Intelligence officer analyzing and leveraging information gaps

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne is told his real name is David Webb by Landy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Informant telling Bourne his real name
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy says Bourne's real name is David Webb
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bourne has been told his real name is David Webb
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bourne's reaction to this information is not shown
evidence_quotes: LANDY David Webb. That's your real name.

relation_updates: Provides Bourne with crucial identity information
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Landy as the source providing Bourne's identity

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Landy helps Bourne by revealing the location, rejecting Blackbriar's actions. Bourne refuses to surrender, enters the hospital alone to end his story, while Landy lets him go.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Ally to Bourne opposing Blackbriar
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy meets Bourne outside the hospital, provides the location code, states her opposition to Blackbriar, and after Bourne refuses to join her, she lets him enter alone.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Landy allows Bourne to enter the hospital alone after he hands her the evidence bag.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Landy will use the evidence to stop Blackbriar.
evidence_quotes: Landy steps out of the lobby to meet him on the sidewalk.
This isn't us, David. What they turned you into, what they're doing with Blackbriar... This has to stop.
Landy lets him go.

relation_updates: Cooperates with Bourne against Blackbriar
Trust established with Bourne
status_updates: Opposes Blackbriar program
Provides location code to Bourne
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An ally who supports Bourne's autonomy by accepting his decision to act alone.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Landy enters an office, uses a fax machine to send Blackbriar documents Bourne retrieved from Vosen's safe.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Agent faxing Blackbriar documents retrieved from Vosen's safe
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Landy finds an open office and begins faxing the Blackbriar documents
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Blackbriar documents are being transmitted via fax
evidence_quotes: She starts faxing the Blackbriar documents Bourne took from Vosen's safe.

status_updates: Actively disseminating sensitive Blackbriar documents

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Landy begins as a skeptical CIA analyst questioning Bourne's threat level, then breaks from the agency to investigate independently. She takes command of the search, opposes Vosen's lethal methods, and uncovers Blackbriar's corruption. Ultimately, she allies with Bourne, gains evidence of illegal operations, and takes action to expose the program.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 15、INT. DAY. CRI OFFICES -- NEW YORK CITY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: VOSEN pressures WILLS to find the source who leaked Blackbriar info to reporter Simon Ross, dismissing Ross as the real issue and demanding identification of the informant.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Head of CRI managing Blackbriar leak investigation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen directs his team to identify the informant who leaked Blackbriar information to Simon Ross, dismissing Ross as secondary.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Identify the source of the Blackbriar leak
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Investigation prioritized on finding the leak source, with ongoing surveillance on Ross
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Identity of the informant remains unknown
evidence_quotes: We tracked the phone. Registered to a London reporter named Simon Ross. He works at the Guardian newspaper.
Ross is easy. I want the source.

relation_updates: Establishes Wills as operational coordinator
status_updates: Actively managing the Blackbriar leak crisis
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Focuses on source identification over peripheral targets

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: VOSEN orders surveillance on British reporter Simon Ross to uncover his secrets and identify his source, declaring NSA priority level 4.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader ordering surveillance operation on Simon Ross
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen addresses the HUB to declare a full priority situation and orders comprehensive surveillance on British reporter Simon Ross, including phones, apartment, car, bank accounts, credit cards, and travel patterns, to uncover secrets and identify his source, setting it as NSA priority level 4.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To monitor Simon Ross's communications and activities to find his source's name and real-time location
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Surveillance operation initiated on Simon Ross with NSA priority level 4
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The identity and real-time location of Ross's source remain unknown
evidence_quotes: Our target is a British national, Simon Ross, a reporter.
I want all his phones, his blackberry, his apartment, his car, bank accounts, credit cards, travel patterns...
And most of all, we want the name and real time location of his source.
This is NSA priority level 4

relation_updates: Directs the HUB team for the operation
status_updates: Operation elevated to NSA priority level 4

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: VOSEN orders WILLS to activate an asset despite unoperational status, demanding immediate options as someone bypasses a blocked cell connection.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Commander ordering premature asset activation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen overrides Wills' objection to activate an unready asset, demanding immediate options.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Gain actionable options by activating the asset
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Asset activation initiated
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Effectiveness of premature activation
evidence_quotes: What's he doing? I thought we blocked his cell? Who the hell is he talking to???
Activate the asset.
I said activate the asset. I want options.

relation_updates: Asserts authority over Wills
status_updates: Asset activation ordered despite unreadiness
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Aggressive decision-maker under pressure

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vosen realizes Bourne is targeting his agents, identifies him as Jason Bourne, and orders both Bourne and Robb to be eliminated.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Commander observing surveillance and issuing elimination order
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen identifies Jason Bourne on screen and orders the asset to eliminate both Bourne and Robb.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Eliminate Bourne and Robb
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Asset assigned two targets; order transmitted for execution
evidence_quotes: On a screen VOSEN watches, transfixed, as BOURNE takes out all his agents and then grabs ROBB...
VOSEN Jesus Christ, that's Jason Bourne.
VOSEN It doesn't matter, the asset now has 2 targets. Take them both out.

status_updates: Asset target list expanded to include Bourne

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vosen sees Bourne as a threat needing elimination, while Landy believes he must be brought in voluntarily for a peaceful resolution.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Advocate for eliminating Bourne based on recent attacks
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen argues that Bourne is a threat who must be eliminated, citing his attacks on men and ultimatum, and rejects Landy's call for voluntary surrender.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Eliminate Jason Bourne as a threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Continued disagreement with Landy on handling Bourne
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether to eliminate Bourne or bring him in voluntarily
evidence_quotes: You "disagree" he's a threat? He just took out two more of my men. Not to mention his ultimatum to Ellatrache?
He wants revenge, Pam. The only realistic way to deal with this is to eliminate the threat.

relation_updates: Deepened conflict with Landy over Bourne strategy
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Insists elimination is the only realistic response to threats

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Landy challenges Vosen's authority to order lethal action against Daniels, who possesses sensitive Blackbriar files; Vosen justifies it with a 'Lethal Action Protocol' bypassing oversight.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: CIA official asserting lethal authority against Landy's challenge
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen invokes the Blackbriar Lethal Action Protocol to justify ordering Daniels' killing without oversight.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Eliminate Daniels to protect Blackbriar operational secrets
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Vosen has defended lethal action authorization, but Landy disputes its legitimacy
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Landy's challenge to the protocol's lack of oversight
evidence_quotes: VOSEN Since he cleaned out a Blackbriar safe and fled to Morocco!

relation_updates: Adversarial confrontation with Landy over authority
status_updates: Authorized for lethal action without oversight
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Assertive official prioritizing mission security over procedural constraints

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne overpowers Desh, who collapses and dies during the struggle; Bourne and Nicky fake their deaths by sending a false message to mislead Vosen and Landy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Vosen sees the false message indicating Bourne and Nicky are dead.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen sees the message 'BOTH OBJECTIVES ACHIEVED' and believes Bourne and Nicky are dead.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Believes the operation is complete with targets eliminated.
evidence_quotes: In the CRI Hub, the message appears. Vosen and Landy see it and believe Nicky and Bourne are both DEAD.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jason Bourne is confirmed alive in New York City; a twelve-block lockdown is ordered and Langley is alerted for backup.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: CTU operational leader ordering lockdown and backup
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen states Jason Bourne is alive in New York City and orders a twelve-block lockdown with Langley backup.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Twelve-block lockdown ordered and FLASH message sent to Langley for backup.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jason Bourne is still at large.
evidence_quotes: Jason Bourne is alive and at large in New York City.
We believe in one thousand yards of this building.
I want an immediate twelve block lockdown of the area.
Send a FLASH message to Langley, prep for local backup assistance.

status_updates: Ordered twelve-block lockdown
Requested Langley backup
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Operational leader issuing direct commands

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: VOSEN demands to read an encrypted text, which is decoded to reveal a meeting location; he orders a team to surround Tudor City and prepares to move.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Operational leader directing pursuit
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After tech decodes encrypted text revealing meeting location, Vosen orders team to surround Tudor City and mobilizes for pursuit.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Intercept target at Tudor City Pl & 42nd
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Team mobilized and en route to Tudor City
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the interception will succeed
evidence_quotes: I want that goddamn text. We need to get out in front of her!
Surround it. Anyone not on Landy goes to Tudor City. Now!
Get the trucks. We're going mobile.

relation_updates: Directs Tech and Wills under high pressure
status_updates: Operational focus shifted to Tudor City
Team mobilized for pursuit
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Frustrated and urgent in directing team under pressure

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bourne confronts Hirsch, identifying him as the mastermind behind Conklin and Abbott, and asserts his true identity as David Webb, which Hirsch acknowledges but dismisses.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Advised to get a lawyer after document exposure
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Vosen enters the room as Blackbriar documents are faxed and Landy tells him to get a lawyer.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Under legal threat from exposed Blackbriar documents
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Impending legal action from Blackbriar exposure
evidence_quotes: Vosen enters the room. The last pages have been faxed...
LANDY You better get a good lawyer.

relation_updates: Landy advises legal counsel, indicating adversarial legal threat
status_updates: Position compromised by exposure of Blackbriar documents

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Vosen, as head of CRI, leads the investigation into the Blackbriar leak, prioritizing informant identification and surveillance of reporter Simon Ross. He escalates operations with aggressive decisions, such as premature asset activation and kill orders, especially after Jason Bourne becomes a primary target. Conflicts with colleague Landy over authority and ethics intensify, culminating in a final pursuit where Vosen faces legal consequences from exposed Blackbriar documents.
